pi_items.source: Task description specifies: 'Create a new survey titled Smartphone Brand Funnel 2026'. Export script searches for surveys with title 'Smartphone Brand Funnel'. Verified against task.json line 5.
Task description specifies Q1 question code as 'Q1_USE' (Multiple Choice). Export script queries for question with title 'Q1_USE' (line 61). Verified against task.json line 5.
Task description specifies Q2 question code as 'Q2_REJECT' (Multiple Choice). Export script queries for question with title 'Q2_REJECT' (line 62). Verified against task.json line 5.
Task description specifies Q3 question code as 'Q3_WHY' (Array). Export script queries for question with title 'Q3_WHY' (line 63). Verified against task.json line 5.
Task description states: 'Set the Array filter exclusion attribute to Q1_USE' for Q2. Verifier (line 80) checks 'if exclude and Q1_USE in exclude'. Verified against task.json line 5.
Task description states: 'Set the Array filter attribute to Q2_REJECT' for Q3. Verifier (line 101) checks 'if include and Q2_REJECT in include'. Verified against task.json line 5.
Task description lists exactly 5 subquestions for Q1 and Q2: Apple, Samsung, Google, Motorola, Sony. Verifier (line 125) checks 'if len(s1) >= 5'. Verified against task.json line 5.

privileged_info_summary: All task metadata claims are verified against the task description and implementation code. The cascading brand exclusion logic task specifies creation of a Smartphone Brand Funnel 2026 survey with three questions (Q1_USE, Q2_REJECT, Q3_WHY) containing exactly 5 subquestions (Apple, Samsung, Google, Motorola, Sony) with specific array filter exclusion (Q1_USE) and inclusion (Q2_REJECT) attributes. The task operates on synthetic data generated entirely within a containerized LimeSurvey environment with no external data sources. All metadata values correctly match the task specification.
